What I've Built

Projects

🌦️
Frontend

Weather Forecast

A responsive weather app that fetches real-time forecasts by city using a public weather API. Displays temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a 5-day outlook with dynamic weather icons.

HTMLCSSJavaScriptWeather API
🛍️
Frontend

E-Commerce Website

A fully functional e-commerce UI with product listings, search & filter, shopping cart, and a checkout flow — built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, no frameworks needed.

HTMLCSSJavaScriptLocalStorage
✅
Frontend

To-Do List

A clean, minimal task manager with add, complete, delete, and filter functionality. Tasks persist across sessions using localStorage, with a smooth UI and priority tagging.

HTMLCSSJavaScriptLocalStorage

Full Stack

RoomSync

A full-stack MERN platform for PG accommodation discovery with real-time chat, OTP verification, Razorpay payments, and role-based access for sellers and customers.
